que: Why is Firebase initialization required in a Flutter app?
options: To prepare Firebase services before they are used

que: Which method is commonly called to initialize Firebase?
Why is WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized() often used before Firebase setup?
options: To support async initialization before runApp()

que: When should Firebase initialization usually happen?
options: Before Firebase services are used, usually at app startup
Only after a user signs in

que: What else is usually needed besides installing Firebase packages?
Which practice should you avoid with Firebase setup?
options: Using Firebase services before initialization completes

que: What can happen if Firebase is not initialized properly?
options: The app gains offline sync automatically
